_comment: Sample properties file for UI preview mode. In production, this is fetched from the docs site.

log_retention_ms.name: log_retention_ms
log_retention_ms.description: How long to keep log segments before deletion. See `delete.retention.ms` for topic-level configuration.

kafka_group_max_session_timeout_ms.name: kafka_group_max_session_timeout_ms
kafka_group_max_session_timeout_ms.description: Maximum allowed consumer group session timeout.

retention.bytes.name: retention.bytes
retention.bytes.description: Maximum size of a partition's log before old segments are deleted.
